headline: Akamai Guardicore Segmentation Transforms Zero Trust with New AI-Powered Capabilities
summary: Latest enhancements enable simpler, faster, and safer segmentationCAMBRIDGE, Mass., March 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) today announced new AI-powered capabilities for Akamai Guardicore Segmentation designed to transform how organizations design and enforce security policies. The solution leverages AI to identify, analyze, and interpret application behavior, then automatically generates accurate, enforcement-ready policies. Organizations can now dramatically speed up segment
